name: paper-attnres-overview
description: Use web_search to search for 'Attention Residuals AttnRes paper Kimi Team residual connections softmax'. Summarize the paper's main contribution in 3 bullet points. Keep your response under 100 words.

ground_truth.reference_answer:
- Attention Residuals (AttnRes), proposed by the Kimi Team (Moonshot AI), replaces standard fixed-weight residual connections in Transformers with softmax attention over preceding layer outputs, enabling each layer to selectively aggregate earlier representations with learned, input-dependent weights.
- Block AttnRes partitions layers into blocks and attends over block-level representations, reducing memory from O(Ld) to O(Nd). With approximately 8 blocks it recovers most gains of Full AttnRes, serving as a practical drop-in replacement.
- Validated on Kimi Linear (48B total / 3B activated parameters) pre-trained on 1.4T tokens, AttnRes matches a baseline trained with 1.25x more compute, boosting GPQA-Diamond by +7.5 and HumanEval by +3.1 with under 2% inference overhead.
key_facts: AttnRes replaces fixed unit-weight residual connections with softmax attention over preceding layer outputs for input-dependent depth-wise aggregation
Block AttnRes partitions layers into blocks to reduce memory from O(Ld) to O(Nd), with ~8 blocks recovering most gains
Implemented in Kimi Linear (48B total / 3B activated MoE), pre-trained on 1.4T tokens
Block AttnRes matches baseline trained with 1.25x more compute
Inference overhead is under 2% and training overhead under 4% with pipeline parallelism
